title: ServerlessFunction
description: Represents a deployable serverless function or edge function unit on a FaaS platform.

name.description: Logical name of the serverless function.

description.description: Description of what the function does.
description.example: Validates an incoming Stripe webhook signature and writes the event to an SQS queue for downstream processing.

runtime.description: Language or runtime the function executes in.

handler.description: Entrypoint reference, typically file and exported function name.

memory_mb.description: Memory allocation for the function in megabytes.

timeout_seconds.description: Maximum execution time before the platform forcibly terminates an invocation.

concurrency_limit.description: Maximum number of concurrent invocations permitted; null indicates platform default unbounded scaling.

triggers.description: Events or sources that can invoke this function.

source.description: Identifier of the trigger source, e.g. event bus name, bucket name, or cron expression.

environment.description: Non-secret environment variables exposed to the function.

region.description: Region or edge location identifier where the function is deployed.

snapstart.description: Whether snapshot-based cold start acceleration (e.g. AWS Lambda SnapStart) is enabled.

package_type.description: How the function code is packaged and deployed.

function_url.description: Direct HTTPS endpoint URL exposed for this function, if any.
